Variables.Name: bDrawTriangleEdges
Variables.Description: should we draw edges of every navmesh's triangle

Variables.Name: bDrawPolyEdges
Variables.Description: should we draw edges of every poly (i.e. not only border-edges)

Variables.Name: bDrawFilledPolys
Variables.Description: if disabled skips filling drawn navmesh polygons

Variables.Name: bDrawNavMeshEdges
Variables.Description: should we draw border-edges

Variables.Name: bDrawTileBounds
Variables.Description: should we draw the tile boundaries

Variables.Name: bDrawPathCollidingGeometry
Variables.Description: Draw input geometry passed to the navmesh generator.  Recommend disabling other geometry rendering via viewport showflags in editor.

Variables.Name: bDrawOctree
Variables.Description: should we draw edges of every navmesh's triangle

Variables.Name: DrawOffset
Variables.Description: vertical offset added to navmesh's debug representation for better readability

Variables.Name: bFixedTilePoolSize
Variables.Description: if true, the NavMesh will allocate fixed size pool for tiles, should be enabled to support streaming

Variables.Name: TilePoolSize
Variables.Description: maximum number of tiles NavMesh can hold

Variables.Name: TileSizeUU
Variables.Description: size of single tile, expressed in uu

Variables.Name: CellSize
Variables.Description: horizontal size of voxelization cell

Variables.Name: CellHeight
Variables.Description: vertical size of voxelization cell

Variables.Name: AgentRadius
Variables.Description: Radius of smallest agent to traverse this navmesh

Variables.Name: AgentMaxHeight
Variables.Description: Size of the tallest agent that will path with this navmesh.

Variables.Name: AgentMaxSlope
Variables.Description: The maximum slope (angle) that the agent can move on.

Variables.Name: MinRegionArea
Variables.Description: The minimum dimension of area. Areas smaller than this will be discarded

Variables.Name: MergeRegionSize
Variables.Description: The size limit of regions to be merged with bigger regions (watershed partitioning only)

Variables.Name: MaxSimplificationError
Variables.Description: How much navigable shapes can get simplified - the higher the value the more freedom

Variables.Name: TileNumberHardLimit
Variables.Description:
Absolute hard limit to number of navmesh tiles. Be very, very careful while modifying it while
	 	having big maps with navmesh. A single, empty tile takes 176 bytes and empty tiles are
	 	allocated up front (subject to change, but that's where it's at now)
	 	@note TileNumberHardLimit is always rounded up to the closest power of 2

Variables.Name: DefaultDrawDistance
Variables.Description: navmesh draw distance in game (always visible in editor)

Variables.Name: DefaultMaxSearchNodes
Variables.Description:
specifes default limit to A nodes used when performing navigation queries. 
	 	Can be overridden by passing custom FNavigationQueryFilter

Variables.Name: DefaultMaxHierarchicalSearchNodes
Variables.Description: specifes default limit to A nodes used when performing hierarchical navigation queries.

Variables.Name: bWithoutLayerCache
Variables.Description: creating navmesh polys without layer cache

Variables.Name: WithoutLayerCachePartitioning
Variables.Description: partitioning method for creating navmesh polys when not use layer cache

Variables.Name: RegionPartitioning
Variables.Description: partitioning method for creating navmesh polys

Variables.Name: LayerPartitioning
Variables.Description: partitioning method for creating tile layers

Variables.Name: RegionChunkSplits
Variables.Description: number of chunk splits (along single axis) used for region's partitioning: ChunkyMonotone

Variables.Name: LayerChunkSplits
Variables.Description: number of chunk splits (along single axis) used for layer's partitioning: ChunkyMonotone

Variables.Name: bSortNavigationAreasByCost
Variables.Description:
Controls whether Navigation Areas will be sorted by cost before application 
	 	to navmesh during navmesh generation. This is relevant then there are
	 	areas overlapping and we want to have area cost express area relevancy
	 	as well. Setting it to true will result in having area sorted by cost,
	 	but it will also increase navmesh generation cost a bit

Variables.Name: bPerformVoxelFiltering
Variables.Description:
controls whether voxel filterring will be applied (via FRecastTileGenerator::ApplyVoxelFilter). 
	 	Results in generated navemesh better fitting navigation bounds, but hits (a bit) generation performance

Variables.Name: bMarkLowHeightAreas
Variables.Description: mark areas with insufficient free height above instead of cutting them out

Variables.Name: bUseBetterOffsetsFromCorners
Variables.Description: TODO: switch to disable new code from OffsetFromCorners if necessary - remove it later

Variables.Name: bStoreEmptyTileLayers
Variables.Description: If set, tiles generated without any navmesh data will be marked to distinguish them from not generated  streamed out ones. Defaults to false.

Variables.Name: bUseVirtualFilters
Variables.Description: Indicates whether default navigation filters will use virtual functions. Defaults to true.

Variables.Name: bAllowNavLinkAsPathEnd
Variables.Description: If set, paths can end at navlink poly (not the ground one!)

Variables.Name: DynamicAffectorUpdateInterval
Variables.Description: Minimal time, in seconds, between active tiles set update

Variables.Name: bUseVoxelCache
Variables.Description: Cache rasterized voxels instead of just collision verticesindices in navigation octree

Variables.Name: TileSetUpdateInterval
Variables.Description: indicates how often we will sort navigation tiles to mach players position

Variables.Name: HeuristicScale
Variables.Description: Euclidean distance heuristic scale used while pathfinding

Variables.Name: VerticalDeviationFromGroundCompensation
Variables.Description: Value added to each search height to compensate for error between navmesh polys and walkable geometry
